_comment: Baseline of KNOWN wire-shape drift between the AxonFlow Claude Code plugin's MCP-response field reads and the AxonFlow agent OpenAPI spec at openapi_specs_sha. The CI gate fails on drift OUTSIDE this baseline. Entries here should be burned down over time via targeted PRs that either (a) update the bash script to match the spec, (b) update the spec to document the missing fields (file platform-side), or (c) recognize the field as @sdkDerived if it's a plugin-side derivation. Generated by scripts/wire-shape/refresh.py.
